sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُدِيرُ: «لَا يُلْدَغُ الْمُؤْمِنُ مِنْ جُحْرٍ مَرَّتَيْنِ».
sentences.translation: Direktor je rekao: «Vjernik se ne ujeda iz iste rupe dvaput».
sentences.translationEn: The director said: «A believer is not stung from the same hole twice».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الشَّخْصَ الْحَكِيمَ لَا يَقَعُ فِي نَفْسِ الْخَطَأِ مَرَّتَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da mudar čovjek ne griješi dvaput na isti način.
sentences.translationEn: This means that a wise person does not make the same mistake twice.

sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ بَاسِمٌ مِظَلَّتَهُ مَرَّةً وَابْتَلَّ بِالْمَطَرِ.
sentences.translation: Basim je jednom zaboravio kišobran i pokisao.
sentences.translationEn: Basim once forgot his umbrella and got wet in the rain.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ كَانَ دَائِمًا يَتَحَقَّقُ مِنَ الطَّقْسِ قَبْلَ الْخُرُوجِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga je uvijek provjeravao vremenske prilike prije izlaska.
sentences.translationEn: After that he always checked the weather before going out.
